title: Quintik Kahr
content:
{{Top|canon=Big Quince}} {{Otheruses|Big Quince}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Big_Quince.jpg]] |name=Quintik Kahr
"Big Quince" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sludir]]{{JournalCite|2|Big Quince (short story)}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Quintik Kahr''', better known as '''"Big Quince"''', was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]-based [[Sludir]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] and the brother of [[Omze'kehr Kahr]]. Before turning to slavery, he was a famous [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]], fighting primarily in the pits of [[Loovria/Legends|Loovria]], using a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]] that he would carry for the rest of his life. Kahr's base of operations was the immense slave [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that was called ''[[Quincey's Girl]]''. He was exceptionally skilled at dealing with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] customs officers, bribing them with [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]], [[Gruvian Tovash]], slave girls and the like, and thus had few problems with the Empire. Quintik Kahr was the owner of [[Tru'eb Cholakk]] and [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], the latter of whom he intended to give to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Antoll Jellrek]] as part of a bribe. However, both Cholakk and Okeefe managed to escape. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Gathering Shadows|book=Tales from the New Republic}} {{Imo}} *{{JournalCite|2|Big Quince (short story)}} {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' *''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{JournalCite|11|Smuggler's Log}} *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Quintik Kahr }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kahr, Quintik}} [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Gladiators]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sludir]]
